changes.map: Added makeshift bridges leading to the eastern side of the Terrorbog
Added a quick way up to the Eastern Highroad through the meeting hall in the camp, as well as a special title for getting to it.
Added braziers along the plank road to help indicate the northern travel point to give just a bit more hope to poor souls without a light source.

changes.rscadd: Added areas for the eastern highroad, eastern highroad camp, and western highroad.
